subject: Science
chapter: The Amazing World of Solutes, Solvents, and Solutions
source_pdf: The Amazing World of Solutes Solvents and Solutions.pdf

activities_projects.title: Comparing Solubility of Sugar and Salt
activities_projects.objective: Investigate differences in solubility of substances
steps: Take equal amounts of water in two beakers
Add sugar in one beaker and salt in the other
Stir both solutions until the solute dissolves
Observe and compare how much dissolves
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn that different substances have different solubility levels

activities_projects.title: Preparing Dilute and Concentrated Solutions
steps: Prepare one solution with one spoon of salt in water
Prepare another with three spoons of salt in the same amount of water
Compare the appearance and taste (teacher supervised)
Discuss which is dilute and which is concentrated

activities_projects.title: Solubility of Solids in Cold vs Hot Water
activities_projects.objective: Study the effect of temperature on solubility
steps: Add equal amounts of solute to cold and hot water
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn that higher temperature increases solubility for many solids

activities_projects.title: Testing Solubility in Different Liquids
activities_projects.objective: Compare solubility in water, oil, and vinegar
steps: Add equal amounts of salt to water, oil, and vinegar
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand that solubility depends on the solvent

activities_projects.title: Measuring Volume of Liquid Samples
steps: Pour water into measuring cylinder up to 30 mL
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to read the meniscus correctly

activities_projects.title: Comparing Density of Different Objects
steps: Calculate density using Density = Mass / Volume
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand density differences among materials

activities_projects.title: Floating and Sinking Objects
steps: Observe whether it floats or sinks
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the relationship between density and buoyancy

activities_projects.title: Density of Liquids Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Compare density of oil and water
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn that less dense liquids float above denser ones

activities_projects.title: Evaporation to Obtain Salt
activities_projects.objective: Understand how salt can be separated from a solution

activities_projects.title: Investigating Air as a Solution
activities_projects.objective: Understand that air is a mixture of gases
steps: Relate air composition to solution concept
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand air as a gaseous solution
